text: Here's what science actually says about liver detox myths. Many believe detox diets can cleanse the liver, but it’s more complex. Your liver is already a detox powerhouse, filtering toxins daily. Studies show supplements claiming liver detox aren't scientifically proven. And guess what? Extreme detox diets can harm your liver! Focus on balanced eating and hydration instead; that’s true liver support. Curious about more health myths? Like and follow for more!
